{{CargoRelic
|name=Bodhisattva's Severed Head
|class_id=20759
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The Yellow Wind Sage stole the head of the Bodhisattva's Statue after being corrupted by Demon Gods. Now it remains missing since Earth's Will imprisoned the traitor.
|fame=18
|art=17
|fth=29
|civ=9
|tech=17
|ss1=Each round, Snail HP +50<br>For each Broken Shell shot down, Snail ATK+1<br>Broken Shells shot down:100/100 times
|ss2=Each round, Snail HP +100<br>For each Broken Shell shot down, Snail ATK+2<br>Broken Shells shot down:100/100 times
|ss3=Each round, Snail HP +150<br>For each Broken Shell shot down, Snail ATK+3<br>Broken Shells shot down:100/100 times
|ss4=Each round, Snail HP +150<br>For each Broken Shell shot down, Snail ATK+3<br>Broken Shells shot down:100/100 times
|ss7=Each round, Snail HP +150<br>For each Broken Shell shot down, Snail ATK+3<br>Broken Shells shot down:100/100 times<br> (Awakened)
}}
